title: euphorbia rotundifolia
intro: Euphorbia rotundifolia, also known as the button bush or button succulent, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it a potential treatment for wounds and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Euphorbia rotundifolia is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and salves that can be applied topically to the skin to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
